daily.today_energy: Mercury's got you feeling introspective but in a good way. This is peak energy for getting real with yourself about what actually matters. Trust your gut instincts—they're basically cosmic receipts right now.
daily.love: Someone might be trying to read between the lines of your energy today. If you're vibing with someone, let your walls down just a tiny bit. Vulnerability isn't weakness; it's literally the hottest thing you can do rn.
daily.career: Your reputation energy is immaculate. People are noticing the quiet moves you've been making. This is the day to speak up in that meeting or share that idea you've been sitting on. Your voice hits different today.
daily.health: Your nervous system is asking for some TLC. Go slow, hydrate intentionally, and maybe spend some time with something that grounds you—whether that's a walk, journaling, or just existing without your phone for a bit.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is asking you to get real with yourself about what you actually want. Mercury's moving in a way that makes those hard conversations feel less terrifying, so lean into that clarity. Trust the shift.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or single, there's something about vulnerability that's suddenly magnetic rn. If you've been holding back, this is your gentle nudge to say what's been on your mind. Real recognizes real.
weekly.career: Your ideas hit different this week—seriously consider pitching that thing you've been sitting on. There's supportive energy around taking up more space professionally. Your instincts about direction are basically spot on.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for rest disguised as movement. Think yoga, long walks, or whatever feels nourishing rather than punishing. Hydration and sleep are genuinely your power moves this week.
